title: Industry Deep-Dive Report
description: Write a long-form industry deep-dive as a collaborative research partner. Faithful lift of the 'content-research-writer' SKILL.md (by ComposioHQ, awesome-claude-skills, Apache-2.0): its eight numbered Instructions steps (understand the project → collaborative outlining + research-to-do → conduct research → iterate outline → draft sections → improve hook → section-by-section feedback → preserve voice → citation management → final review + pre-publish checklist) become an ~11-node DAG. The root node, understand_project, fixes the audience / goal / length / style — the single judgment everything downstream is computed against. Because outline, research-to-do, every drafted section, the hook, the review, the voice pass and the citation polish all read that framing, editing audience mid-run makes the whole draft go stale and rewrite: this is the example's node-level STEER story. Without per-node steering you would re-run the writing project from scratch.

understand_project.name: Understand the Project
understand_project.does: Fix topic, main argument, audience, goal, length/format and voice — the judgment every downstream node depends on.

research_todo.name: Research To-Do
research_todo.does: Enumerate the claims and data points that must be sourced, framed for this audience and angle.

outline.name: Collaborative Outline
outline.does: Structure hook → intro → main sections → conclusion for the fixed audience and goal.

research_collect.name: Conduct Research
research_collect.does: Resolve each to-do into a credible source with extracted fact, quote or datum and a citation.

outline_final.name: Iterate Outline
outline_final.does: Fold the research back into the outline; close gaps, fix flow, lock section order.

draft.name: Draft Sections
draft.does: Write the body section by section against the locked outline and sourced research.

hook_rewrite.name: Improve Hook
hook_rewrite.does: Analyze the opening and offer three stronger hooks (bold statement / story / surprising data).

section_review.name: Section-by-Section Review
section_review.does: Review every section for clarity, flow, evidence and style; record line edits.

voice_check.name: Preserve Voice
voice_check.does: Apply the review as suggestions, not rewrites; keep the writer's tone and POV intact.

polish_citations.name: Polish + Citations
polish_citations.does: Apply the chosen hook and voice-checked edits, format citations and a references list, final polish.

prepub_checklist.name: Pre-Publish Checklist
prepub_checklist.does: Run the final-review checklist: every claim sourced, citations formatted, transitions smooth, CTA present.

deliverable.description: A publication-ready industry deep-dive (report.md) written for the audience fixed in understand_project, plus the locked outline and the project brief that every section was computed against. The trace shows how the deep-dive was researched, drafted, reviewed and polished — and, because every node reads the brief, exactly what would go stale if the audience judgment changed.
